description: Unofficial read-only MCP server for the Panasonic AiSEG2 HEMS controller.
name: io.github.chanyou0311/aiseg2-mcp

environmentVariables.description: Transport. Forced to stdio here so the container matches this stdio package declaration; the image's own default is streamable-http for a standalone `docker run`.
environmentVariables.name: AISEG_TRANSPORT

environmentVariables.description: AiSEG2 base URL, e.g. http://192.168.0.216 (http only).
environmentVariables.name: AISEG_URL

environmentVariables.description: HTTP Digest password for the AiSEG2 web UI.
environmentVariables.name: AISEG_PASSWORD
